---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Hivemind
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the motivation?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Which area does this affect?

- [ ] Server / Orchestrator
- [ ] Web GUI / The Floor
- [ ] Agent definitions / roles
- [ ] CLI
- [ ] Ticket system
- [ ] Memory / Wiki
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other: ___

## Additional Context

Mockups, screenshots, links to related issues, or examples from other tools.
